◎简　　介  

　　The action of the film begins in 1917, "in Bucharest temporarily busy" by the German and Austro-Hungarian armies. The German commander recruited a flock of sheep , loaded them into a freight train, also loaded a few wagons with hayed hay, and urged the police to send 15 people to take care of the sheep on the road.
